expected_properties: Data written to an address is later read back correctly when read_en is asserted
additional_cases.goal: Validate that a write followed by a read of the same address returns the written data.
preconditions: Reset has been released and RAM is initialized
stimulus_intent: Write a value to a chosen address, then enable read of the same address on a subsequent cycle
timing_assumptions: Observe read_data after at least one clock cycle following the write operation

expected_properties: When read_en and write_en are asserted in the same cycle to the same address, read_data remains stable and reflects a deterministic value (pre‑write or post‑write) observable externally
additional_cases.goal: Observe behavior of concurrent read and write to the same address under conservative timing.
stimulus_intent: Assert write_en and read_en together with identical address, provide write_data, and monitor read_data
timing_assumptions: Observe read_data in the same cycle or the next cycle as per conservative observation

expected_properties: Read after a write yields the written data when read_en is asserted after at least one clock cycle
stimulus_intent: Perform a single write followed by a read
timing_assumptions: Allow at least one clock cycle between write and read
